# Tinqbit

> Tinqbit is a Kerala-based full-spectrum digital and technology company offering Digital Marketing, Web Development, IT Solutions, and Advanced Technologies (AI & ML, IoT, Blockchain, Embedded Systems).

Tinqbit was founded with the mission of helping businesses grow through technology. With 5+ years of experience, 40+ happy clients, 50+ projects delivered, and a 15+ member expert team, Tinqbit serves startups, SMEs, and enterprises across industries. The company is headquartered in Kerala, India, and operates across all four major pillars of digital transformation.

## Company

- **Founded:** 2019
- **Headquarters:** Kerala, India
- **Team:** 15+ specialists across marketing, engineering, design, and advanced technology
- **Clients:** 40+ across India and internationally
- **Projects Delivered:** 50+
- **Contact:** info@tinqbit.com
- **Website:** https://tinqbit.com

## Leadership

- **Nikhil A** — CEO & Co-Founder
- **Sreejith Shaji** — CTO & Co-Founder
- **Ajith K R** — COO & Co-Founder

## Services

### Digital Marketing
- SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
- Social Media Marketing
- Meta Advertising (Facebook & Instagram Ads)
- Content Marketing
- Email Marketing
- Branding & Identity

### Web Development
- Custom Website Development
- E-commerce Development
- Web Application Development
- UI/UX Design
- Website Maintenance
- Website Redesign

### IT Solutions
- Custom Software Development
- Mobile App Development (iOS & Android)
- Cloud Solutions
- IT Consulting
- ERP Solutions
- CRM Development

### Advanced Technologies
- AI & Machine Learning
- IoT (Internet of Things)
- Blockchain Development
- Embedded Systems

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://tinqbit.com/index.html): Overview of all services, company stats, about section, and client testimonials

- [Services](https://tinqbit.com/services.html): Full list of all four service pillars
- [Digital Marketing](https://tinqbit.com/digital-marketing.html): Overview of all digital marketing services
- [Web Development](https://tinqbit.com/web-development.html): Overview of all web development services
- [IT Solutions](https://tinqbit.com/it-solution.html): Overview of all IT solutions
- [Advanced Technologies](https://tinqbit.com/advanced-technologies.html): AI, IoT, Blockchain, and Embedded Systems
- [Works / Portfolio](https://tinqbit.com/works.html): Completed projects across industries
- [Team](https://tinqbit.com/team.html): Meet the Tinqbit team
- [Testimonials](https://tinqbit.com/testimonials.html): Client feedback and success stories
- [Blog](https://tinqbit.com/blog/index.html): Articles on digital marketing, technology, and business growth
- [Careers](https://tinqbit.com/careers.html): Open positions and company culture
- [Contact](https://tinqbit.com/contact.html): Get in touch with Tinqbit

## Portfolio Highlights

- **Travit** — Next-gen travel planning platform (Flutter, Supabase, PostgreSQL)
- **KFE Banking Software** — Financial transaction processing system (.NET)
- **Behive OT Module** — Operational technology module (React JS, ASP.NET Core, SQL Server)
- **Nammude Vipani** — E-commerce marketplace (React, PHP, MySQL, AWS)
- **Fundget** — Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) fintech solution
- **Emcon** — IoT dashboard with cloud-based sensor calibration (React JS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, MQTT)
- **SeaBit** — Ship crew safety system with wearable tracking (React JS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, MQTT)
- **CMR Software** — School management system for Vivekananda Vidya Mandir Kangazha (React JS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS)
- **Physiqs** — Gamified fitness and decentralized management platform with tokenized rewards
